module_info.docstring: Tests for tool filtering and push notification features.

methods.name: test_tool_filter_settings_default_disabled
methods.docstring: Tool filtering is disabled by default.

methods.name: test_tool_filter_settings_enabled_with_profile
methods.docstring: Tool filtering can be enabled with a profile.

methods.name: test_tool_filter_settings_custom_mode
methods.docstring: Tool filtering supports custom mode with clusters/tools lists.

methods.name: test_should_expose_tool_disabled_filter
methods.docstring: When filtering is disabled, all tools should be exposed.

methods.name: test_should_expose_tool_minimal_profile
methods.docstring: Minimal profile only exposes essential tools.

methods.name: test_should_expose_tool_custom_include
methods.docstring: Custom profile with include mode only exposes specified clusters/tools.

methods.name: test_should_expose_tool_custom_exclude
methods.docstring: Custom profile with exclude mode hides specified clusters/tools.

methods.name: test_notification_settings_default_disabled
methods.docstring: Push notifications are disabled by default.

methods.name: test_notification_settings_enabled
methods.docstring: Push notifications can be enabled via env.

methods.name: test_emit_notification_signal_disabled
methods.docstring: Signal emission is no-op when disabled.

methods.name: test_emit_notification_signal_creates_file
methods.docstring: Signal emission creates signal file when enabled.

methods.name: test_clear_notification_signal
methods.docstring: Clear signal removes the signal file.

methods.name: test_list_pending_signals
methods.docstring: List pending signals returns all signal files.
